body:
Material: Made from paraffin wax.

Design: Features a stick shape design, with star,balloon and flame shape as the top,available in vibrant colors like red,pink, blue, yellow, and green,print "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" on the candle body.

Wick: Cotton Wick

Size: D7.6xH88mm

Purpose: Happy birthday party
